description: Design a physical security system overlay for a laboratory facility using the floor plan image at ~/Desktop/lab_floorplan.png and the requirements specified in ~/Desktop/security_requirements.txt. Place the required security devices (Cameras, Card Readers, Door Contacts, Motion Sensors, and a Control Panel) in the correct rooms and zones, ensuring all devices are wired to the Security Control Panel located in the IT Closet. The completed system must include at least 8 devices connected to the panel. Save the diagram to ~/Diagrams/security_design.drawio and export the design as a PDF to ~/Diagrams/security_design.pdf.
